name: gdp-academy
description: GDP Studio monorepo — run backend + frontend together

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix backend" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.cjs && npm run dev:vite --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:admin: concurrently -k -n backend,admin -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.cjs && npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n backend,frontend,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev --prefix backend" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.cjs && npm run dev:vite --prefix frontend" "node scripts/wait-for-backend.cjs && npm run dev --prefix admin"
scripts.frontend: node scripts/wait-for-backend.cjs && npm run dev:vite --prefix frontend
